01_idle_front_ref.prompt:
2D pixel-art fighter sprite, Capcom-style (think Street Fighter III / Darkstalkers aesthetic), bold clean outlines, limited rich color palette with strong shading, crisp pixel art at roughly 200-pixel character height inside a 1024px canvas. Character is CENTERED in the frame, full body visible, feet at ~85% down the canvas. IMPORTANT: uniform flat bright magenta background color #FF00FF covering EVERY pixel that isn't the character — no gradient, no shadow on the floor, no vignette, no texture. Pure #FF00FF. CHARACTER IDENTITY (must be preserved exactly across all frames): Marisa Kirisame from Touhou Project. Blonde hair with a long single braid falling over her LEFT shoulder down to her waist. Black pointed witch hat with a wide white band around the base and a red ribbon tied on the front of the band. Sleeveless black witch dress with a white frilled apron tied at the waist with a large purple bow. Long black puffed sleeves with white cuffs. Black knee-high buckle boots. An octagonal brass Mini-Hakkero reactor attached to her waist (right side), faintly glowing golden. Holding a straw broom with a polished wooden shaft in her right hand. Face: large golden-yellow eyes, slightly mischievous expression, small nose, pale skin. NO TEXT, no UI, no motion lines, no watermark, no border.

Marisa Kirisame standing in a neutral idle pose, facing the viewer directly (front view). Feet together. Right arm relaxed at her side holding the broom vertically, tip of the broom touching the ground beside her right foot. Left arm relaxed at her side. Confident calm expression, slight smirk. Hat sitting straight. Braid falling neatly over her left shoulder. The full character is visible from the top of her hat to the tip of her boots, composition perfectly centered. Magenta #FF00FF background filling every pixel around her.
